title: Receptionist client config
description: Every client-specific value for a receptionist build. render.js merges this into the prompt, worker BUSINESS block, and wrangler. Source of field meanings: BUILD-NOTES.md sections 5 & 7.

dayHours.description: Open/close hour for a day, or null if closed.

name.description: Full legal/brand business name, e.g. 'BlueTap Plumbing & Drain'.

shortName.description: Conversational name used in the greeting.

brand.description: Bare brand token, e.g. 'BlueTap' (used in 'X's virtual assistant').

apptNoun.description: What a booking is called, e.g. 'appointment'.

ownerFirstName.description: Owner first name used in off-path routes.

ownerPhone.description: Owner mobile in E.164 (owner alert SMS).

serviceExamples.description: Trade service examples in the opener, e.g. 'clog, leak, no hot water'.

calendarId.description: Google Calendar id the worker books into (client-owned).

avgTicket.description: Average job value in dollars (from the discovery call's ROI numbers). Drives the dashboard's 'revenue captured' figure. Not used by the booking/voice logic.

twilioFrom.description: Twilio number (E.164) SMS sends from AND receives on.

defaultState.description: 2-letter state appended for Smarty when caller omits it.

sheetTab.description: Bookings/VA-queue tab name in the sheet.

baseUrl.description: Deployed worker base URL (no trailing slash).

reminderLeadHours.description: Reminder SMS lead time before appt.

highTicketKeywords.description: Services warranting a human glance (high ticket).

emergencyKeywords.description: Words that force the emergency guardrail (never calendar-booked).

serviceCities.description: Lowercase service-area localities for address locality detection.

emergencyScreenQuestion.description: TRADE-SPECIFIC. The one-line emergency screen the agent asks (e.g. plumbing: 'Any active flooding, sewage, or gas smell?'; HVAC: 'Any gas smell, burning smell, or no cooling with someone vulnerable at home?'). Ask this in the questionnaire.

emergencyExamples.description: TRADE-SPECIFIC. Comma-joined examples that define the EMERGENCY off-path route (e.g. plumbing: 'burst pipe, flooding, sewage, gas smell, no water, ceiling collapse'). Ask this in the questionnaire.

schedule.description: Structured schedule + fee rules. ⚠️ NOT YET ENFORCED BY THE WORKER — today these are prompt-text only (the worker enforces just businessStartH/businessEndH). Reserved for worker-side enforcement (next task). See BUILD-NOTES 'Known limitations'.

days.description: Per-day open/close hour (24h). null = closed that day.

emergencyOnlyDays.description: Days closed to normal booking but open to emergencies, e.g. ['sun'].

sameDayCutoffH.description: After this hour, no same-day booking (24h).

retellLlmId.description: Retell LLM id the deploy script pushes to.

retellAgentId.description: Retell agent id patched + published + re-pinned.

prompt.description: Prompt-only content blocks (structured, formatted into the prompt template).

factsLines.description: The FACTS bullet lines (hours, service area, cutoffs, min fee).

pricingLine.description: The single PRICING line (services joined by ' · ').
